76320.subject: Visa’s Stablecoin Platform launches with Open USD, sending Circle down 6% 😳🪙; Ramp’s free LLM Router isn’t the p…
76320.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1103

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Wednesday! Today, we’re diving into finance giant Visa, which just launched the Visa Stablecoin Platform to rival Circle (why Visa followed the same pattern Anthropic set with Claude Managed Agents [ https://substack.com/redirect/80d80f98-1656-475c-b1c1-7c225409a3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], & what’s the bigger play here + bonus deep dives into Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/2bccca86-4263-4aea-97e7-b8e9829d08b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Circle [ https://substack.com/redirect/7039d116-4e7d-4200-a4c7-0b21223e9710?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the Ultimate List of Stables Resources [ https://substack.com/redirect/5119fcc5-d5c3-4973-a2bb-7d7a1b9ecf2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), spend managemet giant Ramp that just unveiled Free LLM Router, which isn’t even the product (why the fintech giant started giving away free AI infrastructure & how it perfectly captures the AI Monopoly strategy [ https://substack.com/redirect/b952b420-be32-45d6-9b0b-d6bbd7603e8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] + bonus guide to building Agentic OS with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/0732dea7-28c2-4d13-8d36-74687aa36edf?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Nubank, which can now call itself a bank in Brazil (why NU spent pocket change for yet another licence in LatAm, why it’s important for their long-term strategy + bonus deep dive into FinTech funding trends from H1 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/d775abb4-f40a-4001-9af0-dec70c3916c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Visa’s Stablecoin Platform launches with Open USD, sending Circle down 6% 😳🪙
The news 🗞️ Last week, finance giant Visa $V  did what Visa does best: turned complex infrastructure into a managed service. It’s the same pattern Anthropic [ https://substack.com/redirect/ee266c6e-826a-41ce-a4c5-875d8d89919a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] set with Claude Managed Agents [ https://substack.com/redirect/80d80f98-1656-475c-b1c1-7c225409a3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]: own the operational complexity, let your clients skip the buildout. Smart play 👏
The new Visa Stablecoin Platform now lets banks and fintechs mint, move, and manage stablecoins through Visa’s existing rails, starting with Open USD [ https://substack.com/redirect/fd650260-08fa-45cc-bae9-7d9cb090f634?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], the token backed by a 140-member consortium including BlackRock, Stripe, and Coinbase.
Circle’s stock dropped 6% the same day, C

76311.subject: GLS - Dynamické sledovanie zásielky
76311.body: BetterMile /* mobil */ @media only screen and (max-width: 600px){ .wrap { width:100% !important; } .full { display:block !important; width:100% !important; } .p10 { padding:10px !important; } } #outlook a{padding:0;} .ReadMsgBody{width:100%} .ExternalClass{width:100%} .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div{line-height:100%} img{display:block;border:0;outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;} table{border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt;} 96 Líder v kvalite doručovnia balíkov na Slovensku Vám ďakuje za prejavenú dôveru. Radi by sme Vás informovali, že naša služba dynamického sledovania balíkov Vám umožňuje sledovať balík v reálnom čase. Náš systém neustále aktualizuje čas doručenia na základe aktuálnej polohy balíka. S pozdravom GLS Slovakia. Sledovanie môjho balíka www.gls-group.eu GDPR  |  VOP

Vážený zákazník, radi by sme Vás informovali, že balík #PCLID s dobierkou vo výške 27.40 EUR bude doručovaný dnes medzi 12:30 - 14:30, telefónne číslo na kuriéra je +421905686746. Dobierku je možné uhradiť v hotovosti aj platobnou kartou. Odosielateľ: Číslo balíka: Adresa doručenia: party-ohnostroje.sk 1927698363 Trieda SNP, 40 01 Košice I     Košice     04011 PIN kód na doručenie: T3QAE Suma dobierky 27.40 EUR Sledovať balík www.gls-group.eu GDPR  |  VOP

76254.subject: Svadba na Bukovine
76254.body:
Dobrý deň prajem
Váš svadobný deň u Nás sa Vám blíži preto ak na mňa mate akekoľvek 
otázky, som tu pre Vás.
Zároveň sa chcem opýtat,kedy vám  v sobotu vyhovuje stretnutie u nás aby 
sme si prešli posledné detaily,ukázala vam sklady a priestory kde si 
môžte zložiť veci. Hosti budete mat nakoniec 47 dospelých,bez deti?  
Verím, že všetko bude podľa vašich predstav.Tešime sa na Vás.

S pozdravom Veronika Koordinatorka

-- 

Veronika Hricová

Koordinátor na svadbe

+421948 434 576

www.bukovinakosice.sk
